title: Power Management Algorithm
description: Demonstrates a simple power management system for Green IT
code:
PROCEDURE PowerManagement(device)
BEGIN
 idleTime ← 0
 WHILE device IS active DO
 IF device IS idle THEN
 idleTime ← idleTime + 1
 IF idleTime >= threshold THEN
 device.enterSleepMode()
 END IF
 ELSE
 idleTime ← 0
 IF device IN sleepMode THEN
 device.resumeNormalMode()
 END IF
 END IF
 END WHILE
END PROCEDURE
explanation: This algorithm demonstrates basic power management where devices automatically enter sleep mode after a period of inactivity to conserve energy.

title: Server Load Balancing for Energy Efficiency
description: Shows how load balancing can improve energy efficiency in Green IT
code:
PROCEDURE EnergyEfficientLoadBalancer(requests, servers)
BEGIN
 activeServers ← 0
 minServers ← MIN_ACTIVE_SERVERS
 
 FOR each server IN servers DO
 IF server.load > 0 THEN
 activeServers ← activeServers + 1
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 IF requests.count > threshold AND activeServers < maxServers THEN
 servers[activeServers].powerOn()
 ELSE IF requests.count < threshold AND activeServers > minServers THEN
 servers[activeServers - 1].powerOff()
 END IF
 
 balancedRequests ← distributeRequests(requests, activeServers)
 RETURN balancedRequests
END PROCEDURE
explanation: This algorithm dynamically adjusts the number of active servers based on demand, powering down unused servers to save energy.
